languages.text: Несмотря на изменения, постигшие Клеть, коконы с трупами никуда не исчезли. Жители Заркова блюдут традицию.
Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.
languages.original_text: Несмотря на изменения, постигшие Клеть, коконы с трупами никуда не исчезли. Жители Заркова блюдут традицию.

traits.locale_text: Even with the changes that have come to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.
Even with the changes that have come to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.
Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.
Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.

languages.text: 尽管牢笼已经发生了变化，那些尸茧依然保留着。扎尔科夫人仍然遵循着这一传统。
languages.original_text: Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.

traits.locale_text: 尽管牢笼已经发生了变化，那些尸茧依然保留着。扎尔科夫人仍然遵循着这一传统。

languages.text: Kafes'e getirilen değişikliklere rağmen ceset kozaları duruyor. Zarkov halkı bu geleneği hâlâ onurlandırıyor.
languages.original_text: Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.

traits.locale_text: Kafes'e getirilen değişikliklere rağmen ceset kozaları duruyor. Zarkov halkı bu geleneği hâlâ onurlandırıyor.

languages.text: Malgré les changements apportés à la Cage, les Zarkoviens continuent à utiliser leurs cocons à cadavres. C'est une tradition à laquelle ils semblent tenir.
languages.original_text: Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.

traits.locale_text: Malgré les changements apportés à la Cage, les Zarkoviens continuent à utiliser leurs cocons à cadavres. C'est une tradition à laquelle ils semblent tenir.

languages.text: Aun con los cambios en la Jaula, las crisálidas de cadáveres perduran. La gente de Zarkov sigue honrando su tradición.
languages.original_text: Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.

traits.locale_text: Aun con los cambios en la Jaula, las crisálidas de cadáveres perduran. La gente de Zarkov sigue honrando su tradición.

languages.text: Trotz aller Veränderungen im Käfig sind die Leichenkokons geblieben. Die Bewohner von Zarkov ehren noch immer die Tradition.
languages.original_text: Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.

traits.locale_text: Trotz aller Veränderungen im Käfig sind die Leichenkokons geblieben. Die Bewohner von Zarkov ehren noch immer die Tradition.

languages.text: 〈檻〉にもたらされた変化をもってしても、死体の繭は今なお残っている。ザルコフの民は、いまだその伝統を重んじているのだ。
languages.original_text: Even with the changes brought to the Cage, the corpse-cocoons remain. The people of Zarkov still honour the tradition.

traits.locale_text: 〈檻〉にもたらされた変化をもってしても、死体の繭は今なお残っている。ザルコフの民は、いまだその伝統を重んじているのだ。
